name: Italian Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Add olive oil, onion, and garlic to a 1 1/2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Heat uncovered in the microwave for 3 minutes or until the onion is tender, stirring occasionally.
2. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
3. Cover and heat in the microwave for 5 to 7 minutes or until the sauce bubbles.
Makes 2 1/2 cups
